results.message: valid AEO: all required fields present; mutation_capable false
mutated AEO: mutation_capable true; _mutation_marker present — fails closed (NULL)
canonical hash: deterministic across two computations of the same object [sha256: a2f33a60d82d0c2e...]
consumed nonce: replay_state CONSUMED; restoration_eligible false — any reuse returns NULL
replay resurrection attempt: resurrection_claim true on CONSUMED nonce — NULL enforced
unused nonce: replay_state UNUSED — eligible for first-and-only use
append-only: proof state forward transitions only; backwards transitions forbidden
detached continuity: null predecessor lineage — classified DETACHED; no valid authority path
proof existence ≠ finality: local_proof_exists=true with global_quorum_attested=false — LOCAL_VALID only
local-only context: quorum_size 1, result_claim LOCAL_VALID — GLOBAL_VALID is forbidden
partition detected: partition_detected true — execution suspended; PARTITION_SUSPENDED
conflicting proof roots: conflicting_proof_roots true — CONFLICTED classification
quorum disagreement: quorum_disagree true — AMBIGUOUS; GLOBAL_VALID is forbidden
settled convergence: converged and epoch_match true — CONVERGED (not GLOBAL_VALID; conformance ≠ authority)
